headings.usage: Use for primary section headers, widget titles, and numbers.

body.usage: Use for all general UI text, paragraphs, and labels.

mono.usage: Use for the Agentic Log Terminal, API Keys, connection statuses, and metric numbers.

layout_and_spacing.grid_strategy: Control Room Grid. Dense, strict hierarchy. Use grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 with gap-4 or gap-6.
layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Tailwind standard. Padding p-4 to p-6 inside cards to prevent text collision.
layout_and_spacing.radius: rounded-xl for main cards, rounded-md for inputs/buttons. (Subtle roundness)
layout_and_spacing.sidebar: Minimalist vertical sidebar, fixed to the left. Active items highlighted with a subtle electric blue or violet-purple left border and glass background.

buttons.primary: bg-violet-600 hover:bg-violet-500 text-white shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(139,92,246,0.3)] transition-all font-medium rounded-md
buttons.secondary: bg-white/5 hover:bg-white/10 text-white border border-white/10 transition-all rounded-md

inputs.style: bg-black/40 border border-white/10 text-white focus:ring-2 focus:ring-violet-500 focus:border-transparent placeholder:text-slate-500 rounded-md

pipeline_stages.style: Horizontal or vertical flex list. Active steps use a glowing accent color (text-sky-400 or text-violet-400) and an active border. Use 'Tracing Beam' effect if possible.

terminal.style: bg-black border border-white/10 font-mono text-xs md:text-sm text-green-400 p-4 rounded-lg overflow-x-auto shadow-inner h-64 overflow-y-auto

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Interactive elements must change background, border color, or opacity on hover. Use smooth transitions (duration-200 or duration-300).
motion_and_interactions.page_transitions: If using framer-motion, apply subtle fade and slide up (opacity 0->1, y 10->0) for dashboard widgets mounting.
motion_and_interactions.micro_interactions: Pulse animation on the Brain Status widget. Typing effect or fade-in for new terminal logs.

image_urls.description: Abstract neon lines to overlay behind the Brain Status widget with low opacity (e.g., opacity-20) to give a 'neural network' feel.
Placeholder image for a generated AI social media post in the Unified Previewer tile.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text over glassmorphism backgrounds meets 4.5:1 contrast. Use pure white for headings and light slate for body.
accessibility.focus: Use focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-violet-500 focus-visible:ring-offset-2 focus-visible:ring-offset-[#050505] for keyboard navigation.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements (buttons, inputs, tabs, tiles, sidebar links) MUST include data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='sidebar-nav-home').

instructions_to_main_agent: Import Google Fonts in index.css: Outfit, IBM Plex Sans, and JetBrains Mono.
Set the Tailwind config to use #050505 for the root background and apply the custom colors defined in this JSON.
Implement the Minimalist Sidebar Navigation on the left. It should use the glassmorphism surface style.
Use Shadcn UI components heavily but customize them to match the Glassmorphism card style (bg-white/[0.03], border-white/10).
Build the Command Center with a 'Brain Status Widget' that includes a glowing element or the provided background image.
Implement the 'Autonomous Content Pipeline' as a 5-stage visual tracker.
Create the 'Multi-Platform Manager' tiles (FB, IG, X, LinkedIn, TikTok) using grid layout with small connection health indicators (green dots).
Build the 'Ghost Reply Engine' with comment sentiment tags (positive/negative/neutral) and an Autonomous Mode toggle (Shadcn switch).
Create a 'Secure Vault' section for API keys using masked password inputs.
Implement the 'Agentic Log Terminal' as a dedicated dark block (#000000) with JetBrains Mono font mimicking a developer console.
